The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Necromantic Crypt

Equipment fails on approach.
Architecture for vaster entities.
Madness prices true star sights.
AI heralds doom fusion.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • South is a complex dead end
